name: podpilot
title: PodPilot
description: PodPilot: powerful Kubernetes (kube) operations for Raycast
author: brian_keetman

preferences.name: kubectlPath
preferences.title: kubectl Path
preferences.description: Absolute path or command name for kubectl

preferences.name: awsPath
preferences.title: aws Path
preferences.description: Absolute path or command name for aws (for kube exec plugins such as EKS)

preferences.name: terminalApp
preferences.title: Terminal App
preferences.description: App used for exec shell and port-forward commands

preferences.name: execShell
preferences.title: Preferred Exec Shell
preferences.description: First shell attempted for kubectl exec

preferences.name: kubectlTimeoutMs
preferences.title: kubectl Timeout (ms)
preferences.description: Default timeout used for kubectl commands

commands.name: get-deployments
commands.title: Get Deployments
commands.subtitle: Kube
commands.description: Search deployments and open deployment workspace

commands.name: get-pods
commands.title: Get Pods
commands.subtitle: Kube
commands.description: Search pods and run pod actions

commands.name: get-contexts
commands.title: Get Contexts
commands.subtitle: Kube
commands.description: Switch context, manage defaults, and favorites

commands.name: diagnostics
commands.title: Kube Diagnostics
commands.subtitle: Kube
commands.description: Check kubectl/aws paths and connection health
